name: Aïcha
msg: My first money without a bank's permission. Thank you for stopping at our market!

name: Kwame
msg: Learned Lightning at your stop. My shop takes sats now. Safe travels, crew!

name: Fatou
msg: On vous attend à Dakar ! Merci pour ce que vous faites pour l'Afrique.

name: Emeka
msg: Proud to fuel the truck. Sats over inflation. Keep driving! ⚡

name: Mariam
msg: La classe sur le plateau du camion a changé ma façon de voir l'argent.

name: Kofi
msg: 43 of us, one projector, first 1,000 sats each. Unforgettable.

name: Sarah
msg: Sent a few sats from afar. Watching every leg. This is how Bitcoin wins.

name: Ibrahim
msg: Venez à Abidjan ! Nos commerçants sont prêts à accepter le Bitcoin.
